### exit 1
### stdout
### stderr
WARNING! stowing pkg would cause conflicts:
  * cannot stow ../stow/pkg/a over existing target a since neither a link nor a directory and --adopt not specified
  * cannot stow ../stow/pkg/b over existing target b since neither a link nor a directory and --adopt not specified
All operations aborted.
### tree

dir  stow
